bream.reason: Still water can make bream more cautious.
Light wind creates surface chop which helps conceal lines and stimulates feeding.
Strong winds can make fishing difficult but may still concentrate fish.

pike.reason: Calm conditions reduce water disturbance and ambush opportunities.
Wind mixes water and pushes prey fish toward windblown shores.
Strong wind can still stimulate feeding but makes fishing harder.

perch.reason: Calm water makes perch more cautious.
Windy conditions reduce visibility and help perch hunt.
